query.counts: {"targetType": "blog-article", "publishedTotal": count(*[_type == "blog-article" && !(_id in path("drafts.**"))]), "eligiblePublished": count(*[_type == "blog-article" && !(_id in path("drafts.**")) && defined(seo.title) && !defined(metaTitle)]), "eligibleIncludingDrafts": count(*[_type == "blog-article" && defined(seo.title) && !defined(metaTitle)]), "missingSeoTitle": count(*[_type == "blog-article" && !defined(seo.title)]), "alreadyHasMetaTitle": count(*[_type == "blog-article" && defined(metaTitle)])}
